chapter_title.en: Reward of offering Prayer between Masjidul Haraam and Masjidun Nabawi

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1.  Hasan bin Ali Washshaa says that he asked Imam Ridha (a.s.), “Is the reward of offering Prayer in Masjidun Nabawi and  Masjidul  Haraam  equal?  He  replied,  “Yes,  and  the prayers  recited  between  them  is  equal  to 2.000 prayers recited elsewhere.”
